tagline: Bar inventory loss detection — track shrinkage, over-pouring, and stock discrepancies

items: Real-time loss and variance summary for any time period
Health score showing overall inventory status (normal, warning, critical)
AI-generated daily/shift summary — plain English explanation of what was lost and why
Key performance metrics: revenue, covers served, variance totals
Shift-based tracking (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Late Night, or custom time window)
Date range presets: Today, This Week, This Month, or custom
Add and manage all inventory items — bottles, kegs, cases, packs, cans
Categorize items (spirits, beer, wine, keg, mixer, etc.)
Track package types and units per pack (6-pack, case, 24-pack, keg, etc.)
Set cost per bottle/keg/unit for accurate dollar loss tracking
Items grouped by category for easy browsing
View current stock on hand for every item
Freshness indicators — see how recently each item was counted (green/amber/red)
Inline stock editing — update quantities directly from the stock view
Pack breakdown display (e.g. 48 cans = 4 × 12-pack)
Search and filter by category
Manual quantity adjustments recorded with date
Upload a photo or PDF of any supplier invoice
AI automatically extracts all line items, quantities, and costs
Review and edit extracted items before confirming
Automatically updates stock levels when a purchase is confirmed
Learns your product names over time — matched faster on future scans
Flags low-confidence extractions for manual review
Add new inventory items on the spot during invoice review
Compares expected usage (based on drinks sold) vs actual usage (based on stock counts)
Calculates variance in units and dollar value for every item
Status flags: normal, warning, critical thresholds
Filters by status, date range, and item
KPI cards: total estimated loss, critical item count, warning item count
Supports shift-level variance (e.g. just the Friday night dinner shift)
Profit and margin breakdown per drink
Revenue vs profit leaderboard — see your top earners and lowest margin items
Estimated ingredient cost per drink (based on recipes)
Set sell price per drink for accurate margin calculations
AI-generated profit insights — identifies which drinks are hurting margins
Period filtering: 7 days, 30 days, this month, or custom range
Build a recipe for every drink on your menu
Map each drink to its inventory ingredients with exact quantities
Estimated cost per drink calculated automatically
Set sell price per drink
Recipes power variance detection and profit calculations
Supports spirits, beer, wine, mixers, and any other ingredient
Connect to Square, Toast, Clover, or Lightspeed
Automatically imports sales data — no manual entry
Sync by date range
View sync history and status logs
Sales data drives variance and profit calculations automatically
Upload sales data, inventory counts, or purchase records via CSV
Works without a POS system
Validates file format and gives clear error messages
Sample format guide shown in the app
Automatically matches POS item names and invoice names to your inventory
Review and resolve unmatched names from one screen
Once resolved, the match is remembered for all future imports
Separate matching for inventory items and menu items
Searchable library of drinks with recipes, instructions, and notes
Filter by category (cocktail, shot, beer, mocktail, etc.)
Glassware and garnish details
Link library drinks to your operational menu items
Ingredient cost breakdown per drink
Each bar or venue operates as a separate account
Secure login with username and password
All data is isolated per business — no cross-contamination
Works on desktop and mobile
AI invoice scanning — upload any supplier invoice and get line items extracted automatically
AI daily loss summary — plain English rundown of your variance results
AI profit insights — identifies margin problems and revenue opportunities
All AI features are built in — no extra tools or subscriptions needed
